Appearances:
Plaintiff WILLOW TREE INVESTMENTS, INC. is present. Represented by Lolita Carr.
Attorney John P. Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendant TIMOTEO COUOH CHAN is NOT present.
Specially Appearing Attorney Erin Katayama appearing for defendant in full scope.
Spanish Court Interpreter Shannon Raintree is present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of November 28, 2016 remains on calendar.(501)
